title: Zhou Yang | Full Stack Engineer
description: Full stack engineer based in Shenzhen — 5 years of experience crafting clean, scalable web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript & Node.js.
tagline: Clean code · Full stack · Component design

hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer · 5 Years Exp · Shenzhen
hero.description: A full-stack engineer passionate about engineering excellence, component-driven architecture, and end-to-end delivery — from thoughtful database design to pixel-perfect, performant user interfaces.

philosophy.label: My Philosophy
philosophy.paragraph1: Great software is not the product of excessive abstraction. Rather, it is the deliberate simplification of complexity until every module, every component, and every API endpoint serves a clear and single purpose. I believe in writing code that is readable, maintainable, and testable.
philosophy.paragraph2: My practice spans the full stack — from crafting responsive, animated frontend experiences with React and Next.js, to designing robust RESTful APIs with Node.js and Prisma. I thrive on taking features from concept to production, ensuring every layer of the stack is thoughtfully engineered.

items.quote: Delivering complete features from database schema to polished UI — understanding how every layer connects leads to better architectural decisions and fewer integration surprises.
items.author: End-to-End Delivery

items.quote: Writing clean, maintainable code is not optional — it is the foundation of sustainable software. Component-driven architecture, thoughtful naming, and rigorous self-testing are daily habits, not afterthoughts.
items.author: Clean Code & Engineering

items.quote: Fast to adapt, comfortable communicating across teams, and experienced in bridging the gap between technical implementation and business requirements — including 1 year of direct client-facing sales experience.
items.author: Communication & Adaptability
